lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior have significant damage and heavy signs of wear. There are known mechanical and electrical issues that require immediate repair.

Looking for a reliable companion for your daily commutes? This car is ready to hit the road! It's in fair condition, showing some honest signs of its journey so far, but it remains a solid and dependable choice. With a bit of character and a lot of life left, it's the perfect balance of performance and value for your next chapter!
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior are in pristine condition with no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical systems are fully functional.
The car is in fair condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic work to be made roadworthy again. The exterior shows extensive wear, including visible rust on the rocker panels, several deep scratches, and a large dent on the rear passenger door. Mechanically, the engine struggles to idle smoothly and there is a persistent leak from the transmission. Inside, the cabin shows heavy use with torn upholstery on the driver's seat and a non-functional air conditioning system. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited as a project vehicle or for parts.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained. Mechanically, it is solid; the engine runs smoothly, and the transmission shifts reliably. The interior is clean and well-kept, showing only minor wear on the upholstery consistent with its age. On the exterior, the paint retains a healthy shine, though there are a few small stone chips on the hood and a minor scratch on the rear fender. All features, including the air conditioning and power windows, are in full working order. It is a dependable car that has been cared for and is ready for daily use.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. Presented in showroom condition, this unit features an impeccable exterior and a flawless interior, reflecting a legacy of meticulous care. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinction.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this absolute beauty. It is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it left the showroom! I've babied this car since day one, keeping it spotless and strictly following every service interval. If you're looking for that 'brand new' feeling without the brand new price tag, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!
This concours-level E46 M3 represents a superlative example of mechanical preservation. Powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Original factory paint. Full maintenance records provided.

Presented in showroom-ready condition, this vehicle is a true collector-grade example that defies its age. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, having been professionally ceramic coated and garaged since day one. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the factory-fresh scent persists. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, benefiting from a meticulous maintenance schedule with every service performed at authorized dealerships—full service records are included. From the pristine undercarriage to the untouched alloy wheels, every detail has been preserved to the highest standard. This is a turn-key opportunity for a discerning buyer seeking the absolute best-preserved model on the market today.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained to the highest standards of preservation. With impeccable aesthetics and flawless mechanical integrity, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing short of perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising caliber. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, preserved in its original, factory-fresh state. Every surface reflects meticulous care, and the mechanical performance remains flawless. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! You've seriously got to check out this absolute gem! It is in stunning, showroom-ready condition and has been pampered since day one. It looks and feels brand new, and honestly, it drives even better than it looks. I’ve taken such good care of it and I'm so excited for it to find a new home where it'll be just as loved. Come see it for yourself—you won't be disappointed!

This collector-grade specimen features the high-revving S54B32 power plant, exhibiting zero VANOS play and factory-spec compression across all cylinders. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M-differential lock, ensuring surgical power delivery. The chassis has undergone preventative subframe reinforcement and is fitted with Bilstein B16 coilovers for enhanced damping control and roll stiffness. Meticulously maintained with no fluid seepage, the vehicle retains its
Mint condition. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents. Garage kept. Performance is flawless.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its flawless deep-gloss finish and keeping the exterior entirely free of stone chips, swirls, or blemishes. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather seats show zero signs of wear or creasing, the carpets are pristine, and every piece of switchgear operates with a satisfying, factory-new precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive, documented history of preventative maintenance and a performance that is smooth, quiet, and powerful. From the spotless engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, this vehicle has been cherished by a single owner and never driven in inclement weather. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection and an investment-grade example, this is the definitive model to own.

Presented in impeccable condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every surface reflects meticulous care, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments. Mechanically superior and visually indistinguishable from new, this offering is tailored for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than excellence.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-ready condition, reflecting a standard of preservation that satisfies even the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, has been meticulously maintained to ensure an uncompromising driving experience. We invite you to acquire a vehicle that transcends the standard pre-owned market.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total stunner! This car is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this beauty since day one, keeping it garage-parked and meticulously maintained. You won't find a single blemish or hiccup here. It's ready for a new owner who will love it just as much as I have. Come see it for yourself; you're going to fall in love!

Offering a superlative driving experience, this specimen features a high-revving, naturally aspirated flat-six engine mated to a precision short-throw 6-speed manual gearbox. The powertrain remains in peak operating condition, maintaining factory-spec compression across all cylinders and an immaculate valvetrain.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included. Inspection welcome.

This vehicle is in truly impeccable, showroom condition, meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner and stored in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, rock chips, or swirls, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin retains its factory-fresh aroma; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of bolster wear, and every electronic component—from the infotainment system to the heated seats—operates flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is perfect, backed by a comprehensive service history performed exclusively at certified dealerships. It drives with the precision, power, and tightness of a brand-new vehicle. Included with the sale are both original keys, the factory window sticker, and all original manuals. This is a rare opportunity for a collector or discerning buyer to own a turn-key example that needs absolutely nothing.

Presenting an automotive specimen of peerless refinement. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting showroom standard, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting an uncompromising commitment to mechanical and aesthetic excellence. Its condition is definitive, offering the discerning enthusiast a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of the marque. We invite serious inquiries to experience this benchmark of quality firsthand.

We are pleased to present this superlative example of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, the vehicle exhibits a level of aesthetic and mechanical integrity typically reserved for the showroom floor. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the flawless exterior finish, reflects a commitment to excellence. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of peerless quality and distinction.

Hey friends! Looking for a ride that’s basically brand new? I’m selling my absolute gem of a car and it is in flawless, pristine condition! I’ve taken such good care of it, it honestly still has that new-car feel. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. Come take a look, you’re going to love it!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3 in pristine condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag six-speed manual gearbox. The chassis is impeccably maintained, with preventative subframe reinforcement and a fully serviced VANOS system ensuring peak mechanical integrity. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the aesthetics are flawless, retaining original factory tolerances and a showroom-level finish throughout. A purist’s specification with zero modifications and a documented service history.
Mint condition. Flawless paint and interior. Low mileage. Garage kept. Full service history included.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, maintained with obsessive attention to detail since the day it left the showroom. The exterior features a mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, preserved entirely in a climate-controlled garage and protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in absolute showroom state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and completely free of creases, while every button and dial functions with crisp, factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive, documented history of preventative maintenance and a drive that feels as tight and responsive as the day it was built. With no scratches, no stone chips, and a smoke-free interior that still carries a hint of that new-car scent, this is undoubtedly one of the finest examples available on the market today. It comes complete with all original keys, manuals, and a pristine service log for the discerning buyer who demands perfection.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, maintained to an exacting standard and preserved in impeccable condition. This specimen exhibits the aesthetic and mechanical integrity of a showroom-fresh unit, representing a rare acquisition for the most discerning enthusiast. Its flawless finish and uncompromising performance profile distinguish it as a premier example within its class.
